CheckTitle: Ensure legacy authentication is blocked via Conditional Access
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled CA policy blocks legacy authentication protocols (Exchange ActiveSync, IMAP, POP3) which bypass MFA entirely.
Risk: Legacy auth protocols do not support modern authentication or MFA. Attackers use password spray attacks against these endpoints to bypass MFA enforcement.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy that blocks access for 'Exchange ActiveSync clients' and 'Other clients' client app types for all users.
